name: Queen's Academy
description: A leading primary and secondary school in the heart of Gwarinpa, offering quality education with modern facilities, experienced teachers, and a nurturing environment for children ages 3-16.

name: Royal Specialist Clinic
description: A modern medical facility in Wuse offering general consultation, laboratory services, pharmacy, maternal care, and specialist referrals. Open 24 hours for emergencies.

name: Mama Nkechi's Kitchen
description: Popular local restaurant serving fresh Nigerian dishes daily. Famous for jollof rice, pepper soup, and pounded yam with egusi. Catering available for events.

name: Abuja Cool Tech
description: Professional air conditioning installation, repair, and maintenance services across Abuja. We service all brands including Samsung, LG, Daikin, and Haier Thermocool.

name: Glamour Spot Salon
description: Premium unisex salon in Maitama offering haircuts, braiding, coloring, facials, manicure, pedicure, and bridal packages. Walk-ins welcome.

name: PrintMax Digital Services
description: Full-service printing and branding company. We handle business cards, banners, flyers, branded materials, T-shirt printing, vehicle branding, and signage for businesses across Abuja.

name: Swift Motors Auto Workshop
description: Reliable auto mechanic workshop in Kubwa. Engine repairs, brake work, electrical diagnostics, body work, and routine servicing for all vehicle makes.

name: LifeCamp Pharmacy
description: Community pharmacy serving Life Camp and surrounding areas. We stock a wide range of prescription and over-the-counter medicines, health supplements, and baby care products.

name: Haven Properties Ltd
description: Real estate company specializing in residential and commercial properties in Asokoro, Maitama, and Wuse. Property sales, rentals, facility management, and investment advisory.

name: DigiFix Tech Solutions
description: IT services company providing computer repairs, networking, CCTV installation, website development, and managed IT support for businesses in Abuja.

name: Lugbe Gas Depot
description: Reliable cooking gas refilling station in Lugbe. We also sell gas cylinders, cookers, regulators, and accessories. Home delivery available within Lugbe and surrounding areas.

name: Grace Events & Decor
description: Event planning and decoration company based in Central Area. We handle weddings, corporate events, birthdays, and conferences. Full-service including venue sourcing, catering coordination, and decor.
